title: Test your hearing and join the conversation with Spec-Savers Robbergbay Audiology
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Advertorial","html":"Advertorial"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Spec-Savers Robbergbay Audiology is proud to be a part of South Africa's largest audiology network, with over 65 stores nationwide.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Spec-Savers Robbergbay Audiology is proud to be a part of South Africa's largest audiology network, with over 65 stores nationwide."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Hearing care specialist Rethea Maree and her friendly team are passionate about making audiology services more accessible and affordable to the South African public."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With her training in cognitive behavioural therapy under a tinnitus and holistic specialist in London, Maree takes a holistic approach to tinnitus and hearing loss, combining counselling techniques with ongoing aural rehabilitation for optimal outcomes.","html":"With her training in cognitive behavioural therapy under a tinnitus and holistic specialist in London, Maree takes a holistic approach to tinnitus and hearing loss, combining counselling techniques with ongoing aural rehabilitation for optimal outcomes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She is passionate about creating ethical, evidence-based and patient-centred plans for individuals with hearing-related communication challenges, finding the greatest joy in witnessing each person's progress.","html":"She is passionate about creating ethical, evidence-based and patient-centred plans for individuals with hearing-related communication challenges, finding the greatest joy in witnessing each person's progress."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Maree and her team at Spec-Savers Robbergbay Audiology offer free hearing screenings as well as services, which include diagnostic hearing tests, wax removal, hearing aid accessories, hearing aid cleaning, noise protection and earplugs.","html":"Maree and her team at Spec-Savers Robbergbay Audiology offer free hearing screenings as well as services, which include diagnostic hearing tests, wax removal, hearing aid accessories, hearing aid cleaning, noise protection and earplugs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Spec-Savers Audiology provides the latest high-tech hearing aids from world-leading manufacturers, fitted according to best practice audiology guidelines, along with ongoing aftercare support.","html":"Spec-Savers Audiology provides the latest high-tech hearing aids from world-leading manufacturers, fitted according to best practice audiology guidelines, along with ongoing aftercare support."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Their latest promotion features the brand-new ClarityPro rechargeable hearing aids. For a limited time, customers can take advantage of the buy one, get 50% off the second offer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Visit audiologist Rethea Maree and her friendly team at Spec-Savers Robbergbay Audiology today for professional service and affordable audiology solutions.","html":"Visit audiologist Rethea Maree and her friendly team at Spec-Savers Robbergbay Audiology today for professional service and affordable audiology solutions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Call 044 312 0979 to book your hearing test or book online at specsavers.co.za.","html":"Call 044 312 0979 to book your hearing test or book online at specsavers.co.za."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Test your hearing and join the conversation with Spec-Savers Robbergbay Audiology
